nodes.label: AI as syntax executor for technical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: let the bot just take care of the syntax

nodes.label: AI adherence to team conventions
nodes.grounding_span: make sure it sticks to my team's general conventions

nodes.label: AI use in personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use bots in communication like emails and teams messages because I find it impersonal

nodes.label: AI autonomy in code review
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use it to review or finalize mine or others' code because if it misses something then I'm still responsible

nodes.label: AI as efficiency booster with human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: we use it insofar as it makes us more efficient but we don't allow a complete AI takeover

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I fear I will become over-reliant on the bots and lose ability to manually do certain things

nodes.label: Professional accountability and responsibility
nodes.grounding_span: I still am held responsible for code I write and review

nodes.label: Personal authenticity in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I find it impersonal and unnecessary

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: maximize my own reliability in the places where AI has gaps

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as syntax executor
nodes.grounding_span: let the bot just take care of the syntax

nodes.label: Frustration with AI not following conventions
nodes.grounding_span: the cursor assistant refused to abide by some of our syntax and naming standards

nodes.label: Rejection of AI for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use bots in communication like emails and teams messages because I find it impersonal

nodes.label: Rejection of AI for code review due to responsibility
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use it to review or finalize mine or others' code because if it misses something then I'm still responsible

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI as efficiency tool with boundaries
nodes.grounding_span: we use it insofar as it makes us more efficient but we don't allow a complete AI takeover

nodes.label: Concern about over-reliance and skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: I fear I will become over-reliant on the bots and lose ability to manually do certain things

nodes.label: Iterative review-and-refine loop
nodes.grounding_span: I feed it context and logic, it drafts, I review or iterate, and this loop continues until a task is done

nodes.label: Boundary-setting around AI autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't allow it complete independence because I still am held responsible
